metaTitle: Ant Control NYC | Ant Extermination | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control and extermination in NYC. All ant species. Free inspection. 30-day guarantee. Licensed exterminators starting at $150. Call now.
h1: Ant Control in NYC — Colony Elimination, Not Just Surface Treatment
heroParagraph: Ant problems in NYC are colony problems. Spraying the ants you see does nothing to the tens of thousands living in the nest. Professional ant control uses non-repellent bait that worker ants carry back to the colony — eliminating the queen, the brood, and the entire population, not just the foragers on your countertop.
